Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-26 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
FUWAY dominates today's rankings at #1 with a composite score of 95.3, driven by exceptional long-term returns of 996% over one year while maintaining consistent momentum across all timeframes—its 1-year return outpaces SPY by 968 percentage points. HIMX ranks second with strong near-term acceleration (77% in one month, 178% in three months) but shows momentum deceleration in the 6-month and 1-year ratios (1.17 and 0.9), suggesting the move may be moderating. Both tickers pass all SMA gates (trading above their 30, 50, 100, and 200-day moving averages), indicating sustained uptrends, though FUWAY's bad_spy_score of 0.93 shows it actually outperforms on weak market days while HIMX's score of 3.04 reveals significant underperformance when SPY declines. FUWAY's thin volatility profile (vol_ratio 0.41) contrasts with its explosive returns, suggesting concentrated buying power, whereas HIMX's correlation to semiconductors (XLK at 0.399) indicates sector-specific momentum.
